Title: MHB ARGAN OIL SHAMPOO & CONDITIONER  SULFATE FREE  250ml Each
Body (HTML):
ARGAN OIL SHAMPOO & CONDITIONER

Sulfate-free shampoo and conditioner are hair care products that do not contain sulfates, which are harsh detergents commonly found in traditional shampoos and cleansers. Sulfates can strip the hair of its natural oils, leaving it dry and prone to damage. Sulfate-free formulas are gentler and can help maintain the natural moisture balance of the scalp and hair. They may contain alternative cleansing agents such as coco betaine or sodium cocoyl isethionate. Sulfate-free conditioners are designed to nourish and detangle hair without weighing it down or leaving a residue. They may contain natural oils, plant extracts, or hydrolyzed proteins to help strengthen and protect the hair. Sulfate-free hair care is a good choice for people with sensitive scalps, color-treated hair, or those who prefer a more natural approach to hair care.
Product Category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Hair Care > Hair Care Kits
Tags: ARGAN OIL, Deep Conditioning, HERBAL SHAMPOO

Title: MHB VITAMIN C SHEA BUTTER SUGAR SCRUB - 150G
Body (HTML):
The Mhb Vitamin C Shea Butter Sugar Scrub is a luxurious skincare product that combines the benefits of exfoliation, hydration, and nourishment. With a weight of 150 grams, this scrub is designed to effectively remove dead skin cells, leaving your skin smooth, radiant, and revitalized.

The key ingredient in this scrub is Vitamin C, a powerful antioxidant known for its ability to brighten the skin and reduce the appearance of dark spots and uneven skin tone. It helps to promote a more youthful and vibrant complexion while protecting the skin against environmental damage.

Enriched with shea butter, the scrub provides intense moisture and hydration, helping to improve the skin's elasticity and softness. Shea butter is known for its deeply nourishing properties, leaving your skin feeling silky and supple.

The sugar particles in the scrub act as natural exfoliators, gently buffing away dull and dead skin cells, revealing a fresh layer of healthy skin. This exfoliation process helps to improve the texture of your skin, promoting a smoother and more even complexion.

The Mhb Vitamin C Shea Butter Sugar Scrub is suitable for all skin types and can be used on both the face and body. It has a delightful scent that adds a touch of indulgence to your skincare routine, making it a pleasure to use.

To use, simply take a small amount of the scrub and massage it onto damp skin in circular motions, focusing on areas that need extra attention. Rinse thoroughly with warm water to reveal beautifully revitalized and glowing skin.

Pamper yourself and elevate your skincare routine with the Mhb Vitamin C Shea Butter Sugar Scrub, and experience the benefits of exfoliation, hydration, and nourishment all in one luxurious product.

Title: MHB Rose Facial Kit - Pack of 6
Body (HTML):
Introducing the luxurious MHB Rose Facial Kit, a comprehensive skincare regimen packed with the rejuvenating essence of roses. This exquisite pack of 6 products is meticulously crafted to cleanse, nourish, and revitalize your skin, leaving it with a radiant and youthful glow.

1. **Rose Facial Cleanser (300ml):** Begin your skincare ritual with our indulgent Rose Facial Cleanser. Formulated with the essence of fresh roses, this gentle yet effective cleanser effortlessly removes impurities, makeup, and excess oil, leaving your skin feeling clean, refreshed, and delicately fragrant.

2. **Rose Facial Massage Cream (150g):** Pamper your skin with the luxurious Rose Facial Massage Cream. Enriched with the goodness of rose extracts, this velvety cream deeply nourishes and hydrates your skin while promoting circulation, leaving it supple, smooth, and radiant.

3. **Rose Clay Mask (150g):** Treat your skin to the purifying benefits of our Rose Clay Mask. Infused with natural rose extracts and purifying clay, this mask effectively draws out impurities, toxins, and excess oil, leaving your skin feeling detoxified, tightened, and rejuvenated.

4. **Rose Toner (150ml):** Rejuvenate and tone your skin with our refreshing Rose Toner. Enriched with the essence of roses, this alcohol-free toner helps to balance pH levels, tighten pores, and restore the skin's natural moisture barrier, leaving your skin feeling revitalized, hydrated, and radiant.

5. **Rose Moisturizer (150ml):** Nourish and hydrate your skin with our luxurious Rose Moisturizer. Infused with the soothing essence of roses, this lightweight yet deeply hydrating moisturizer absorbs quickly into the skin, providing long-lasting moisture, leaving it soft, smooth, and delicately scented.

6. **Watermelon Scrub (150g):** Exfoliate and invigorate your skin with our refreshing Watermelon Scrub. Enriched with the goodness of watermelon extracts, this gentle exfoliating scrub buffs away dead skin cells, impurities, and dullness, revealing a brighter, smoother, and more radiant complexion.

Indulge in the ultimate pampering experience with the MHB Rose Facial Kit and unveil the beauty of your skin with the timeless elegance of roses.
Product Category: Health & Beauty

Title: MHB Super Women Kit - Pack of 6
Body (HTML):
Introducing the MHB Super Women Kit, a comprehensive collection designed to support women through every phase of their menstrual cycle and beyond. This pack of 6 essential items provides comfort, hygiene, and wellness to empower women to embrace their femininity with confidence and grace.

  1. Sanitary Napkin (Day Use) x 2: Stay fresh and comfortable all day long with our Day Use Sanitary Napkins. Designed for maximum absorption and leak protection, these pads provide reliable comfort during your active hours.

  2. Sanitary Napkin (Night Use) x 2: Enjoy a restful night's sleep with our Night Use Sanitary Napkins. With extra length and superior absorbency, these pads provide overnight protection, ensuring you wake up feeling refreshed and confident.

  3. Sanitary Napkin (Pantiliner) x 1: For everyday freshness and light protection, our Pantiliners are your go-to solution. Ultra-thin and discreet, these liners provide comfortable coverage for everyday use.

  4. Feminine Intimate Wash 250ml x 1: Maintain intimate hygiene with our gentle and effective Feminine Intimate Wash. Formulated with mild ingredients and pH-balanced to support the natural balance of your intimate area, this wash keeps you feeling clean, fresh, and confident.

  5. Rose Cleanser 300ml x 1: Treat your skin to the soothing properties of roses with our Rose Cleanser. Formulated to gently cleanse and refresh your skin, this luxurious cleanser removes impurities while leaving behind a delicate rose fragrance, indulging your senses with every use.

  6. Detox Tea x 1: Nourish your body from within with our Detox Tea. Crafted with a blend of herbal ingredients, this tea helps support detoxification, digestion, and overall well-being, making it the perfect addition to your self-care routine.

Empower yourself with the MHB Super Women Kit, a complete package designed to cater to the diverse needs of modern women, promoting comfort, confidence, and holistic wellness throughout every phase of life.
